---
title: "Lecture 08"
author: "Bill Perry"

execute: 
  paged-print: false
  fig-width: 5
  fig-height: 5
format:
  html:
    downloads: [docx, pptx, typst]  # This creates download links for all three
  revealjs:
    output-ext: "slides.html"
  docx: default
  pptx: default
---

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| 
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(flextable)
library(pwr)  # For power analysis
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)

# Set a seed for reproducibility
set.seed(42)
```

# Lecture 7 Review
